wins: Closed the aoa-sdk skill runtime recommendation gap end-to-end with full-suite and lint proof.
Replaced manual host-inventory dependence with canonical install-root auto-discovery while preserving explicit override paths.
frictions: Truthful host availability still depends on canonical install roots actually being populated.
The seam is now honest, but stricter fail-fast policy for router-only risk gates is still deferred.

extracts.title: Recommendation Truth / Host Actionability Split
extracts.summary: A reusable control-plane law for keeping router recommendation truth separate from host actionability and resolving actionability through canonical install-root discovery plus router-only demotion out of activate_now.
notes: The surviving value is reusable seam discipline for detectors and reports, not one bounded executable leaf workflow.

deferrals.title: Automation promotion
deferrals.reason: One bounded seam fix is not enough reviewed repeat signal to justify an automation-opportunity packet.

deferrals.title: Quest promotion
deferrals.reason: No single repeated reviewed quest-shaped unit remains as the only unresolved object.

quest_hooks.reason: The remaining reusable object is a technique candidate rather than a quest-promotion ambiguity.
